# Agents

This fixture simulates a consumer repo where SPADE was onboarded previously
at an older version. The marker-replace contract must rewrite the block in
place on the second run (re-stamping the version) without duplicating it.

## Project-specific rules

- Prefer explicit types over `any`.
- Every pull request must have tests.
- No emoji in source files.

<!-- SPADE-FRAMEWORK-START v1.0.0 -->
OLD AND STALE CONTENT — this represents a previous SPADE fragment that
the current fragment file should replace. If marker-replace works, this
text will be gone after onboarding runs.
<!-- SPADE-FRAMEWORK-END -->

## More project rules after the block

- The block must not swallow this content.
